title: Noida International Airport Jewar LIVE: Inauguration by PM Modi shortly; tight security, traffic curbs in place
description: Noida International Airport Jewar LIVE: The airport will serve as a primary international airport for major Uttar Pradesh cities such as Noida, Meerut, Ghaziabad, Mathura and Agra and will also act as a gateway to several pilgrimage and tourist destinations.
